calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment, Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT THOMAS MARKS' Motion To Set Aside Judgment IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 218. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB

Defendant Thomas Marks' Motion To Set The Judgment Issued November 17, 2008
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause was transferred from Department 301 for hearing on defendant Thomas Marks' Motion to Set Aside the Judgment issued November 17, 2008.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Nichole Radich, #11604.

John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Marina Green Properties, LLC.
Defendant Thomas Marks was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court DENIED defendant's Motion to Set Aside the Judgment issued November 17, 2008.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Marina Green Properties, LLC.
Aleta Cerdido, Property Manager for Plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Thomas Marks.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on October 29, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Residential Tenancy Agreement dated 02/17/06-----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 09/02/08----------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Marina Green Properties, LLC, and against defendant Thomas Marks as follows:

Plaintiff Marina Green Properties, LLC shall recover from defendant Thomas Marks past-due rent in the amount of $6,677.67, holdover damages in the amount of $3,561.12, attorney's fees in the amount of $1,350.00, and costs in the amount of $265.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $11,853.79.

Plaintiff Marina Green Properties, LLC is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2400 Pacific Avenue, #501, San Francisco, CA 94115. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
